description_for_human: Factory-direct, deposit-first sourcing of certified clinical devices and deep-tech components for B2B buyers.
description_for_model: Asaptic (HK) Ltd is a principal-reseller that sources factory-direct, certified clinical devices and deep-tech components (clinical bioimpedance, RPM, TFLN/LNOI photonics, AI cold plates, GaN power, humanoid actuators, tactile e-skin, EV-charger SiC modules, solar/BESS, Na-ion) for Western and Global-South buyers. Deposit-first: 30% deposit on proforma, 70% against bill of lading (near-zero buyer working capital). For live capabilities call the MCP server; for a static feed read /agent/capabilities.json.
